description: Established account, gambling merchant, borderline confidence, analyst notes suggest legitimate spend
input:
--- FRAUDSENTINEL REJECTED TRANSACTION ---

TRANSACTION
  Amount:    £1,850
  Currency:  GBP
  Merchant:  BetKing Casino
  Location:  United Kingdom
  Date/Time: 2024-06-22 21:15 UTC
  Device:    Mobile (known — registered)
  IP:        82.44.201.17

USER PROFILE
  Account ID:       ACC-03291
  Account age:      142 days
  Tx count:         31
  Avg spend:        £95
  Known countries:  UK
  Known merchants:  Sainsburys, Spotify, ASOS, Just Eat
  Typical hours:    07:00–23:00

FRAUDSENTINEL OUTPUT
  Detector flags:   high_risk_merchant, amount_vs_baseline
  Detector score:   54 / 100
  Investigator:     Deviation score 41 / 100
                    Account shows occasional evening spend. No prior gambling
                    transactions. Amount is 19x above average but account has
                    established history. Single anomaly on otherwise clean profile.
  Final verdict:    REJECTED
  Confidence:       61%
  Decision reason:  High-risk merchant (gambling) with significant amount deviation.
                    Borderline score — investigator notes established account history
                    as mitigating factor.

ANALYST NOTES
  Customer called in last week asking about betting limits — may be intentional spend.
